subcodes.first_line: Recall, O Leaf of Paradise, Thy servant, that he may be numbered among them that remember God, Who created him and created all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر ورقه الفردوس عبده لیکون من الذاکرین الله الذی خلقه و خلق کلشیء و کل
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @station of the Manifestation of God, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @creation of the world
